issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderIsName' (checks Leader), not 'HasCardOnBoard' (checks board). Leader is not a card on the board.
SearchDeck with 'maxCost:3' searches for cost ≤3. Effect requires cost ≥3 ('cost of 3 or more'). Should use 'minCost':3 instead.

SearchDeck does not support the full effect: look at 4 cards, reveal up to 1, place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL cannot express 'look at X cards' or 'place rest at bottom in order' mechanics. Effect requires custom implementation or extended action type.

Three separate effects for three different Leaders should be consolidated into one with 'LeaderHasAnyType' or 'OR' condition logic if DSL supports it, or use a single compound condition rather than three identical triggers.

suggestedDsl.note: Standard DSL cannot fully represent 'look at 4 cards, reveal up to 1 with cost ≥3, place rest at bottom in order'. Recommended custom action or extended schema.

actions.note: Limitation: cannot express 'look at 4 cards' constraint or 'place rest at bottom in order' mechanic
